name: default
description: Markdown sibling of the visual-exploration board: a title, the motivating context, and a repeated direction block (name heading + rationale notes). The agent renders the directions array to repeated sections before substitution.

slots.description: Prompt or problem statement that motivated the exploration.
Direction name; the section heading. Repeat the direction block once per entry in the directions array (see shape).
Rationale notes for the direction: when it fits and the trade-offs.
